text.headline: Sean Xiang — Founder Chronicle

text.headline: Age 16 — USTC
text.text: Entered the University of Science and Technology of China (working narrative; source verification pending).

text.headline: Early Technical Formation
text.text: Built the foundation for a long technical trajectory.

text.headline: CUHK PhD
text.text: Advanced training in Electrical and Electronic Engineering at The Chinese University of Hong Kong.

text.headline: Beckman Laser Institute / UC Irvine
text.text: Research chapter in California before the founder arc.

text.headline: Bloombase Founded
text.text: Co-founded Bloombase in the Silicon Valley / Redwood City context.

text.headline: VMware Technology Alliance
text.text: Bloombase joins VMware Technology Alliance Partner Program.

text.headline: Hitachi Alliance
text.text: Bloombase joins Hitachi Data Systems' Technology Alliance Program.

text.text: StoreSafe certified interoperable with HP Enterprise Secure Key Manager.

text.text: Bloombase joins Thales ASAP alliance.

text.text: Cloud and security certification milestone.

text.text: StoreSafe receives IBM Ready for Security Intelligence validation.

text.text: StoreSafe for VMware Cloud on AWS announced.

text.text: Launch Academy / Maple public expansion chapter.

text.headline: Azure Marketplace
text.text: Bloombase StoreSafe available in Microsoft Azure Marketplace.

text.text: Cloud data-at-rest protection collaboration.

text.headline: Futurex Collaboration
text.text: Security partnership milestone.

text.headline: NVIDIA DPU / GPU Era
text.text: Rebuilding Bloombase data-at-rest security with NVIDIA DPUs and GPUs.

text.headline: Utimaco Alliance
